seo.title: Showrooms — Broadway, Ludlow & Chelsea
seo.description: Visit a Savery's of Broadway showroom in Broadway, Ludlow or Chelsea. Designer fabrics, bespoke furniture and interior design, in the Cotswolds since 1942.

hero.heading: Our showrooms
hero.subtitle: Visit Saverys in Broadway, Ludlow, or our London studio in Chelsea — places to see fabric, feel weight, and begin a conversation.

intro.heading: Three locations, one library
intro.body: Both Cotswolds showrooms hold the same fabric library, the same standards, and the same team. Our Chelsea studio in London is where city clients meet, plan, and review — backed by the same makers in Broadway and Ludlow.

showrooms.name: Broadway
showrooms.description: Our Cotswolds home — set within the Cotswold Design Centre on Kennel Lane. Premium fabrics, curated furniture, and the hand upholstery workshop.
showrooms.address: Cotswold Design Centre, Kennel Lane, Broadway, WR12 7DJ

showrooms.name: Ludlow
showrooms.description: On Tower Street in the heart of Ludlow, serving Shropshire, Herefordshire and the Welsh Marches. Home to our curtain and soft furnishings workroom.

showrooms.name: Chelsea
showrooms.description: A London studio for considered design — consultations, fabric reviews, and project meetings on Kings Road, by appointment.
showrooms.address: Suite 9, 405 Kings Road, Chelsea, London, SW10 0BB
